history.content: Hey! 👋 What do you want to tackle?
can you build me a new landing page, name is Landing_page. Just make it a single html page but make it a full comprehensive landing page

Done — I built a full, comprehensive single-page landing page as **`Landing_page.html`**.

It includes:
- Sticky navbar
- Hero section with CTAs
- Features grid
- Showcase/how-it-works
- Pricing plans
- Testimonials
- FAQ
- CTA banner
- Contact section with form
- Responsive design + clean styling

If you want, I can also make a second version in a different style (minimal, corporate, or bold startup) as `Landing_page_v2.html`.
